text.title: reranking-pipeline-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for reranking-pipeline-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using batch reranking with ThreadPoolExecutor without testing realistic candidate pool sizes and worker counts on the target infrastructure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large candidate_pool_size x max_workers can exhaust ulimit on open file descriptors. Test under load before deploying.
